'''Skyesports Champions Series''' is a tournament organized by '''Skyesports''' for professional teams of {{Flag|in}} India with a total prize pool of ₹25,00,000 {{Abbr/INR}}. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{broadcasterCard |position=Commentator |lang=in |b1=Fyxs |b2=Captain Price |b3=LUCIF3R |b4=NekRoz }} ===Format=== *'''''Skyesports Champions Series''' : June 7th - 18th ** '''Quarter finals''' : ''June 7th -8th *** 19 Invited teams. *** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 6}} teams qualify for ''Semi finals. ** '''Semi finals''' : ''June 9th - 13th *** 24 teams , 5 matchdays. *** 18 invited teams. *** {{bgcolortext|stayup|Top 6}} teams from ''quarter finals. *** Teams are divided equally in 3 groups of 8. *** Round-robin format. *** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for ''finals. ** '''Finals''' : ''June 14th - 18th *** 16 teams , 6 matchdays. *** 30 matches (6 each day). {{VerticalMargin}} {{PUBGM 2023 Points System |toggle=false}} ==Prize Pool== {{box|start|padding=2em}}
